note: M8 texture/colormap/palette compiler (H4) artifact. Assets from trimmed Freedoom (BSD). E1M1 span on dev Freedoom (gitignored). Deterministic; src/doomfj/texturecompiler.py.

e1m1_texture_span.note: 1 dispatch entry per texel (byte result); the §1.3 textures-dominate-LUT-span line. Compare against the ~300K design estimate; downscale is the span lever if over budget.

finding: E1M1 full-res textures ~1.29M texels (~4x the ~300K design estimate) -> downscale lever (D5) likely needed; decided at R0 (M10).
